summary: Comprehensive testing of Wanderlust Mobile app completed. Backend APIs work perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI and core interactions functional with minor state persistence issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Intermittent state persistence - bucket list items sometimes disappear between tab switches

passed_tests: All 6 backend API endpoints working correctly
Tab navigation between all 4 screens (Map, Discover, Bucket List, Profile)
Map screen renders with Leaflet dark mode, pins, legend, search overlay
Map search functionality opens and accepts input
Discover screen shows swipe cards with destination details
Heart button on discover cards adds items to bucket list
Bucket list badge shows correct count when items added
Profile screen displays auth form with login/register tabs
Social feed displays mock traveler activity
Auth form tab switching between Sign In and Create Account
Mobile-first responsive design with earthy dark theme
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate state management in Zustand store - bucket list items occasionally don't persist between tab switches. This may be related to component re-rendering or store synchronization.
